body: Dear Customer, you have transferred 150.00 Birr to 09XXXXXXXX. Transaction ID: 1A2B3C. Balance: 500.00 Birr.
Dear Customer, 350.00 Birr transferred to your account from 09YYYYYYYY. Balance: 850.00 Birr.
ለ 0912XXXXXX ብር 200.00 በተሳካ ሁኔታ ልከዋል። የግብይት መታወቂያ: 9F431M2YC5። ቀሪ ሂሳብ: 650.00 ብር።
Dear Customer, ETB 1,500.00 has been debited from your account 1000xxxxxx on 15/03/26 14:45. Balance: ETB 14,000.00. Thank you for banking with CBE.
Dear Customer, your account 1000xxxxxx has been credited with ETB 5,000.00 on 15/03/26 10:30. Balance: ETB 15,500.00. Thank you for banking with CBE.
ውድ ደንበኛችን፤ ከሂሳብዎ (1000xxxxxx) ላይ ብር 500.00 ወጪ ሆኗል (15/03/26 15:30)። ቀሪ ሂሳብዎ ብር 16,500.00 ነው። ከኢትዮጵያ ንግድ ባንክ ጋር ስለሚሰሩ እናመሰግናለን።
Maamilaa kabajamoo, herregni keessan 1000xxxxxx guyyaa 15/03/26 10:30 irratti qarshii 5,000.00 akka seene galmeeffameera.
Dear Customer, your account ...5678 has been debited ETB 200.00. Balance: ETB 800.00.
Dear Customer, your account ...1234 has been credited ETB 1,000.00. Balance: ETB 1,800.00.
ውድ ደንበኛችን፤ ከሂሳብዎ (...5678) ላይ ብር 1,000.00 ወጪ ሆኗል።
Maamila Kabajamoo, Herregni keessan ...1234 qarshii 3,000.00 galii ta'eera.
Dear Customer, your account ...9100 has been debited ETB 500.00. Balance: ETB 1,500.00.
Dear Customer, your account ...4500 has been credited ETB 2,500.00. Balance: ETB 4,000.00.
ውድ ደንበኛችን፤ ከሂሳብዎ (...9100) ላይ ብር 2,000.00 ወጪ ሆኗል።
Maamila Kabajamoo, Herregni keessan ...9100 qarshii 2,000.00 baasii ta'eera.
